headline: Is Ross Stores (ROST) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After A 65% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Ross Stores at US$227.82 is priced for perfection or still offers value, this article breaks down what the current share price might be implying about the stock. With returns of 3.0% over 7 days, 9.9% over 30 days, 24.7% year to date and 64.8% over the last year, Ross Stores has given investors plenty of reasons to recheck whether the current valuation still stacks up. Recent coverage has focused on Ross Stores as a well known off price retailer, with attention...
